enable_server.description: Start the embedded FastAPI REST gateway.

host.description: Bind address for the REST gateway. Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access.

port.description: Bind port for the REST gateway.

auth_token.description: Bearer token required by all authenticated endpoints.

cors_allow_origins.description: Allowed CORS origins for browser-based clients.

enable_docs.description: Expose the FastAPI Swagger UI and OpenAPI schema.

docs_path.description: Path of the Swagger UI endpoint.

openapi_path.description: Path of the OpenAPI JSON schema endpoint.

capture_recent_sessions.description: Capture incoming sessions for proactive reply endpoints.

max_recent_sessions.description: Maximum number of recent sessions kept in memory.
